title: MJPRU Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: MJPRU Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Rohilkhand University Result 2026 Out for BCom Finance, BHMCT, BPharma, BTech, Diploma Engineering, BLIB, BMS, LLM, MCA, MCom, MPharma, MSW, MTech, MTech PhD and PGDCA odd semester exams on the official website - mjpruiums.in via mjpru.indiaexaminfo.co.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the MJPRU result.

content.text: Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Rohilkhand University (MJPRU) has announced MJPRU Result 2026 for multiple odd semester examinations conducted in the 2025-26 academic session. The newly released results include BCom Finance 3rd and 5th semester, BCom Financial Services 3rd and 5th semester, BHMCT 3rd, 5th and 7th semester, BLIB 1st semester, BPharma 3rd, 5th and 7th semester, BMS 3rd semester, BTech 5th semester, Diploma Engineering 3rd semester, LLM 3rd semester, MCA 3rd semester, MCom 3rd semester, MPharma 3rd semester, MSW 3rd semester, MTech 3rd semester, MTech PhD 3rd semester and PGDCA 1st semester. MJPRU Result 2026 has been released online on the official examination result portal mjpruiums.in, with direct access provided through mjpru.indiaexaminfo.co.in. Students from UG, PG and professional programmes can now check their odd semester results by selecting the correct course and semester and entering their roll number or other required credentials. After downloading their online marksheets, candidates should verify their details, subject-wise marks and result status, and contact the university or their college examination cell if any discrepancy is noticed.

MJPRU has declared odd semester results for the 2025-26 academic session across a wide range of programmes, including commerce, engineering, pharmacy, hotel management, library science, management, law and computer applications. The MJPRU Result 2026 update covers 3rd, 5th and 7th semester exams for BCom Finance, BCom Financial Services, BHMCT, BPharma, BTech and Diploma Engineering, while BLIB, PGDCA and several PG courses have their 1st or 3rd semester results published. All results are accessible through the online result interface where students can choose the academic session 2025-2026, result type (main/odd semester) and then generate their individual scorecards.

MJPRU has enabled direct access to odd semester results through its UMS result system and associated link mjpru.indiaexaminfo.co.in, where all course-wise results are hosted on a common interface. Students must choose the academic session 2025-2026 and select the appropriate course and semester to fetch their result using their university roll number. The links below will take students to the main MJPRU result portal, from where they can view or download their course-specific marksheets.

links.label: BCom Financial Services 3rd and 5th Semester Result 2026

content.text: Use the steps below to check and download MJPRU Result 2026 for your course and semester:

items: Open the official MJPRU result portal at https://mjpru.indiaexaminfo.co.in/ or go via the UMS link from mjpruiums.in.
On the result home page, select the appropriate result type (usually Main/Odd Semester) and choose the academic session 2025-2026 from the drop-down list.
Select your course and semester (for example, BCom Finance 3rd Sem, BTech 5th Sem, MCA 3rd Sem, etc.) from the available options.
Enter your University Roll Number or any other required credentials in the given field and submit the form.
Your MJPRU Result 2026 will appear on the screen, showing subject-wise marks, total marks and result status (pass/fail/back).
Download or print the online marksheet and keep it for reference until you receive the official hard copy from the university or college.
If you find any discrepancy in your marks or personal details, contact your college examination cell or the MJPRU examination department as per the guidelines on the official website.

structured_links.label: BCom Financial Services 3rd and 5th Semester Result 2026
